message:
fix(clippy): resolve all remaining CI lint failures

- Exclude fastcma submodule from workspace clippy (external code we cannot modify)
- Allow suboptimal_flops lint workspace-wide (mul_add changes floating-point
  semantics; separate multiply-then-add is intentional)
- Gate Linux-only /proc parse helpers with #[cfg(any(target_os = "linux", test))]
  in pressure.rs, lifecycle.rs, and searcher.rs to suppress dead-code warnings
  on macOS CI
- Gate std::fs and std::path::Path imports in pressure.rs for same reason
- Remove redundant .into_iter() in zip argument (runtime.rs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -97,7 +97,7 @@ jobs:
         run: cargo check -p frankensearch-fsfs --no-default-features
 
       - name: cargo clippy
-        run: cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
+        run: cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --exclude fastcma -- -D warnings
 
       - name: cargo fmt --check
         run: cargo fmt --check

@@ -176,6 +176,8 @@ manual_is_multiple_of = "allow"
 duration_suboptimal_units = "allow"
 # async fns without await are fine as trait implementations / future-proofing.
 unused_async = "allow"
+# Separate multiply-then-add is intentional; fused mul_add changes semantics slightly.
+suboptimal_flops = "allow"
 
 [profile.release]
 opt-level = 3
